title: BriefAudit
description: Audit record for a ResearchBrief produced by the dossier workflow (agency/capabilities/prompt/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — prompt-dossier wave). Links AUDITS→ResearchBrief; gates the dossier finalize phase via prompt.audit_gate.

brief.description: Reference to the ResearchBrief node being audited (node ID or slug).

clarity_score.description: Clarity score in [0,1] — computed by prompt.audit from structure, specificity, and coverage checks.

status.description: Audit outcome. 'passed' unblocks the finalize phase; 'failed' requires revision.
